description_long: This is a male adult pedestrian dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a long-sleeve pullover with a high collar and a scarf draped around the neck. He wears camouflage-patterned cargo pants tucked into sturdy, knee-high boots, and has protective knee pads. His hands are gloved, and a crossbody strap runs diagonally across his torso, supporting a small pouch at his hip. The figure has a short, textured hairstyle and a well-groomed beard, giving him a rugged, streetwise appearance. Accessories include a pendant necklace and a utility belt, suggesting readiness for active movement in an urban environment.
description: A rugged male adult pedestrian in urban casual wear with a scarf, cargo pants, boots, gloves, and utility accessories. He has a short hairstyle and a confident, ready stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the scarf, pendant, gloves, crossbody strap, pouch, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the pouch on the hip, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the crossbody strap, and the back of the boots and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the glove details, the side of the boots, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: urban casual pullover with scarf, cargo pants, gloves, and knee-high boots with knee pads
